# Akash Mahajan — Full Context

> Founder of Kloudle and Appsecco. Building security tools, AI agents, and open-source projects.
> Website: https://akashm.dev | X: @makash | GitHub: makash

## Identity

- Name: Akash Mahajan
- Location: India
- Focus areas: Cloud security, application security, AI agents, developer tools, education
- Handles: @makash (X, GitHub, YouTube), /in/akashm (LinkedIn)
- Personal site: https://akashm.dev

## Companies

### Kloudle (https://kloudle.com)
Role: Founder
Cloud security for the agent era. Scanning, detection, and posture management built for teams shipping with AI agents. Products include Kloudle Scan (open-source CSPM tooling) and the Kloudle Agent Security Platform (private SaaS).

### Appsecco (https://appsecco.com)
Role: Founder
Application security consulting and training company. Services range from traditional penetration testing to AI red teaming. Builds AI-powered security tools and maintains open-source security knowledge bases. Training programs help pentesters transition into AI security roles.

## Active Projects (16 total)

### Security Tools
1. **SPA Hacker Agent** — Agent-driven single-page application security scanner with browser automation, recon workflows, and exploit validation. Uses Playwright for browser-based testing. https://github.com/makash/spa-hacking-agent
2. **Kloudle Scan** — Cloud security posture scanning tooling adapted for modern cloud and agentic workflows. Open-source CSPM. https://github.com/Kloudle/kloudle-scan
3. **Kloudle Agent Security Platform** — Private backend/frontend services for Kloudle's agent-era security platform covering scan, detection, data analysis, and reporting.
4. **Web Security Scanner AI Agent** — AI-assisted web application security scanner focused on practical recon, analysis, and testing. https://github.com/appsecco/appsecco-web-security-scanner-ai-agent
5. **MCP Client & Proxy** — MCP proxy/client tooling for routing and inspecting MCP server traffic during security testing. Private.
6. **OpenClaw Secure Setup** — Opinionated security hardening and deployment flow for running OpenClaw quickly and safely. https://github.com/makash/getbot-secure-openclaw

### AI Agent & Developer Tools
7. **ccrank.dev** — Leaderboard and analytics for Claude Code usage, with a live public scoreboard. https://github.com/makash/claude-leaderboard-using-ccusage
8. **clawdwa** — Use Claude from WhatsApp groups; a chat bridge for fast, collaborative agent workflows. https://github.com/makash/clawdwa
9. **Great Web Copy** — Claude Code plugin to generate high-converting website copy using structured copywriting frameworks. https://github.com/makash/great-web-copy
10. **PMF Plugin** — Plugin-oriented toolkit focused on product-market-fit validation workflows. https://github.com/makash/pmf-plugin

### Education & Community
11. **Learn Claude Code Workbook** — Hands-on guides for founders and engineers to become productive with Claude Code. https://github.com/makash/learn-claude-code
12. **Pentester to AI Red Teamer** — Training platform and curriculum to help traditional pentesters transition into AI red teaming. https://github.com/appsecco/pentester-to-ai-red-teamer
13. **AI Security Knowledge Base** — Structured knowledge base of Appsecco methodologies for AI and application security testing. https://github.com/appsecco/appsecco-ai-security-kb
14. **Cloud Security List** — Curated resource hub for cloud security engineers, tools, and practical references. https://github.com/makash/cloud-security-list
15. **Learn Kannada Alphabet** — Offline-ready educational PWA for early learners to practice Kannada alphabet basics. https://github.com/makash/learn-kannada-alphabet-for-kids
16. **Scam Calls India** — Public awareness and data project documenting patterns in scam calls in India. https://github.com/makash/scam-calls-india
